overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a futuristic open-world game (Cyberpunk 2077) showing a character walking through a neon-lit commercial district, passing pedestrians and a sports car before ascending stairs to a restricted building entrance. The scene features high-end real-time rendering with ray-traced reflections and neon lighting accents.

events.description: character walks past two NPCs standing and conversing near the metal railing

illuminated green neon text and graphics on the building facade

segments.scene_description: The segment opens under a futuristic green neon-lit canopy along a commercial walkway. The player character walks forward, passing two NPCs conversing by a railing that overlooks a sunken plaza. A sleek gray sports car with purple stripes is visible parked on the street to the right, and the glass building facade reflects the bright midday sunlight.

scene_state.functional_zone: open city street with vehicle traffic and digital billboards

events.description: futuristic gray sports car with purple racing stripes drives past on the right side of the street

agents.ego_description: continuing along the open sidewalk parallel to the street, moving past street bollards as the sports car drives by

notable_agents.action: futuristic gray sports car with dual purple racing stripes driving along the street from background to foreground, passing the camera's position

entered.detail: large purple and blue digital advertisement screen displaying animated graphics
short black and yellow metal posts lining the edge of the sidewalk
tall futuristic skyscrapers and construction cranes visible in the background

segments.scene_description: Moving out from under the canopy into open sunlight, the character walks along the street edge. The gray sports car with purple stripes drives past on the right, moving from the background toward the foreground. Digital billboards and futuristic skyscrapers line the street ahead, while black and yellow bollards mark the sidewalk boundary.

scene_state.functional_zone: grand building entrance with staircase and glass canopy

events.description: character turns left toward the building entrance and begins ascending the wide concrete staircase
approaching the glass entrance doors where red 'NO ENTRY' signage becomes clearly visible

agents.ego_description: turning toward the building entrance and climbing the wide concrete staircase with white metal railings, approaching the restricted glass doors

entered.detail: glass and steel canopy with green neon lighting covering the building entrance area
wide concrete staircase with multiple steps leading up to the building entrance
white painted metal handrails with horizontal bars flanking both sides of the staircase
large floor-to-ceiling glass doors with metal frames serving as the building entrance
tall green cacti and desert plants in planters along the left side of the stairs
angled black steel support beams visible through the glass facade
red illuminated text reading 'NO ENTRY' displayed on the glass doors

segments.scene_description: The character turns left away from the street and approaches a grand building entrance. Ascending the wide concrete staircase flanked by white railings and cactus plants, the camera moves under a glass entrance canopy. The glass doors ahead display a red 'NO ENTRY' sign, with the building's modern interior visible through the reflective glass as the character reaches the top of the stairs.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a neon-shaded commercial walkway into the bright sunlight of a futuristic city street, ending at a restricted building entrance. It begins under a green neon canopy where the character passes conversing pedestrians and a parked gray sports car with purple stripes reflected in a glass facade. As the camera moves out from the shade into open sunlight, the sports car drives past on the right while the view expands to reveal towering skyscrapers and digital billboards lining the street. The scene then shifts as the character turns away from the road and ascends a wide concrete staircase flanked by white railings and cactus plants. Finally, the camera moves under a glass canopy to face a set of reflective doors marked with a red no entry sign.
